description: Filter a molecule library by an include substructure pattern and write a per-molecule match report (Index, SMILES, Status, Matches). PATTERN is interpreted as SMARTS first, then SMILES; each molecule is tagged included / no_match (excluded when an exclusion pattern matches). The core script also ships named pattern libraries (functional-groups, rings, pains, privileged) for richer filtering.
rules: read-only — parses molecules and writes a match-report CSV; mutates nothing remote
INPUT may be .sdf/.mol or .smi/.smiles/.txt (one SMILES per line, no title line)
PATTERN is a SMARTS (or SMILES) substructure query applied as an inclusion filter
usage: Set INPUT (molecule file) and PATTERN (SMARTS/SMILES). Output: report.csv.
limitation: Requires the rdkit library (Python >=3.9); when absent the porter degrades gracefully and writes a stub so governance still runs offline. An invalid PATTERN that parses as neither SMARTS nor SMILES yields no inclusion filter.
